decisions.title: Model Selection for Ask SIFT Production
decisions.context: Running evals against GPT 5.1, Gemma 31B, and other models to determine production model. Critical for Ask SIFT quality/cost tradeoff and Build the Moat pillar.

arguments.for: GPT 5.1 likely offers best quality; Gemma 31B offers cost/control benefits; need data to decide
arguments.against: Waiting delays Ask SIFT improvements; multiple evals increase cycle time

decisions.title: Compaction Architecture Fix Required
decisions.context: L1 output files not deleted (ENOSPC) and sort key mismatches causing fragmentation. Threatens Nail the Core pillar and gov-scale reliability.
decisions.blockedBy: Gov-scale assessment (ENG-10237) needed to understand full scope

arguments.for: Critical reliability issue; blocks gov deployments; data loss risk
arguments.against: Major refactor risk; may need architectural redesign vs quick fix

decisions.title: Prioritize Explore V2 vs Canvas Feature Parity
decisions.context: Multiple Explore V2 features in flight (calculated channels, channel list improvements, UDF fixes). Need to decide completion criteria before Canvas push.

arguments.for: Explore V2 is core product; need solid foundation before Canvas expansion
arguments.against: Canvas is key differentiator for Embed Deeper; may be stealing cycles

decisions.title: Sift Edge GA Readiness Gate
decisions.context: Enum/units/descriptions support, GUI table view, soak testing v0.9.0 in progress. Need GA criteria definition.

arguments.for: Edge is critical for Embed Deeper pillar; need clear launch criteria
arguments.against: May be too aggressive; gov-scale issues could delay

decisions.title: Security/Compliance Sprint Required
decisions.context: Multiple security items: ECR KMS encryption, Route53 logging, CVEs, IAM Bedrock access. Blocking gov deployments.

arguments.for: Gov compliance non-negotiable; blocks revenue; grouped sprint is efficient
arguments.against: Pulls eng from feature work; may not be on critical path for immediate deals

timeAudit.weekSummary: Heavy meeting load (80% calendar). Focus blocks fragmented across deep technical work (compaction, model evals). 3 1:1s with storage, ML, and product leads on decision escalations.
alerts: Compaction crisis consuming unplanned eng hours - may need to defer Canvas work
Model eval parallelization (3+ models) creating context-switching overhead
Security compliance work not scheduled but blocking gov deals
Calculated channel performance issue could cascade to customer escalations
